positive: A cute, anthropomorphic sloth character wearing a tiny adventurer's backpack and hiking through a stylized jungle. The style should be clean, charming, and highly marketable, resembling modern sticker art or enamel pin illustrations. Pastel color palette, simple outlines, joyfully rendered.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, hyperrealistic, dark, scary
